allow: Bash(npm install express sqlite3 better-sqlite3 cors)
Bash(npm install -D typescript @types/node @types/express @types/better-sqlite3 @types/cors ts-node nodemon concurrently)
Bash(sqlite3 data/gogetajob.db "ALTER TABLE project_snapshots ADD COLUMN price INTEGER DEFAULT 0")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const db = new Database\(''data/gogetajob.db''\); db.exec\(''ALTER TABLE project_snapshots ADD COLUMN price INTEGER DEFAULT 0''\); console.log\(''Added price column''\); db.close\(\);")
